mechanism_explained: Topic is narrowed into a falsifiable hypothesis before prose creates false momentum.
Hypothesis; source evaluation; and design plan are locked before the literature review inherits overclaims.
Assertion typing determines what evidence and design the paper must provide.
Causal language is licensed only when the design and assumptions support the counterfactual comparison.
Constructs are inferred from instruments; so claims must be scoped to what the instrument can actually support.
Data-quality failures propagate through analysis unless diagnosed before statistical testing.
Statistical claims become defensible only when test choice; assumptions; effect size; uncertainty; and multiplicity are visible.
A figure maps data to visual channels; and each channel carries specific perceptual assumptions.
Synthesis converts individual sources into a field map that justifies the paper's niche.
Section order controls alignment between what the paper did; what it found; and what it claims.
A claim audit aligns every sentence with the evidence; preventing fluent prose from laundering weak reasoning.
Peer-review simulation exposes cross-section and evidence weaknesses before external reviewers do.
Ethical screening aligns disclosure; scope; citation balance; and accountability before submission.
Sentence-level revision makes the claim; evidence; actor; and epistemic force visible.
